package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringConcatenationForPathJoin() string {
    ruleID := "string_concatenation_for_path_join"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`dir + \"/\" + file` or manual path assembly via `+` concatenation"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
